title: Sigma Lucky Block
description: Adds The Sigma Lucky Block which can be found around the World and includes various random Drops
body:
This Mod adds the Sigma Lucky Block which includes over _100+_ unique Drops. These Drops can contain different sorts of items like Custom Weapons with abilities aswell as Armor that can apply the Player special effects and with it comes custom structures that can spawn like a well or a pyramid.

The Lucky Block can generate all over the Player's World but it could be challenging to find these making them feel rewarding and special.
